//: Polyglot project manifest. The CLI (check/build) and the language server read this to resolve modules with no flags. `root` is relative to this file (the base for logical imports like "geometry"); `lib` is the ambient prelude auto-imported everywhere (so `print` and `Math` resolve); `targets` is the project's target set — a bare `polyglot build` emits all of them, and the LSP squiggles reserved-identifier collisions per listed target.
